summary: Step-by-step checklist for running a safe Quick Start scan.
examples: Run an automated scan on a staging app.
Use the built-in browser for a manual explore pass.
Review alerts and export a report.
diagrams: Quick Start workflow: target -> spider -> active scan
Alert review flow: scan -> triage -> report
content:
## Overview
Quick Start is the fastest way to run a baseline scan against an authorized target.

### What it does
- Crawls the target with the spider
- Optionally uses the AJAX spider for JS-heavy apps
- Runs active scanning to identify issues

### Safety reminders
- Only scan systems you are authorized to test
- Use Protected mode to avoid out-of-scope scans
title: Guide 1: Quick Start Checklist
steps: Confirm you have written authorization to test the target.
Open Quick Start and select Automated Scan.
Enter the target URL and select spider options if needed.
Run the scan and monitor the progress tab.
Review alerts by risk and confidence, then export a report.
